General.Name: NedSense Enterprises NV
General.Description: MKB Nedsense N.V. engages in the financing and lending of funds to natural persons and legal entities. It provides guarantees and/or other securities to third parties for its obligations and/or for obligations for companies in its investment portfolio. The company was formerly known as Nedsense Enterprises N.V. amd changed its name to MKB Nedsense N.V. in February 2018. MKB Nedsense N.V. was founded in 1999 and is based in Bussum, the Netherlands.

0.Name: Mr. Peter Paul F. de Vries
0.Title: Chairman of the Board of Director & CEO
